backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing user profiles with access control and providing DCF financial calculations using validated input models.
feature_evidence.json: Metadata describing a feature removal with affected files, components, tests, and confidence level.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of various frontend files covering styling, utilities, DCF logic, form behavior, UI changes, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base theme defining OKLCH color tokens and dark mode variables for global styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell loading the React app with SEO meta tags and a generated favicon.
frontend/scripts/check-required-generate: Node script ensuring required generated image assets exist before building.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app composing inputs form, actions, and results with shareable link handling and dev checks.
frontend/src/components/CalculatorAction: UI action bar for example inputs, reset, link copying, and optional dev checks.
frontend/src/components/DcfInputsForm.ts: Form component rendering company snapshot fields with validation messages and typed input handling.
frontend/src/components/FormulasDialog.t: Displays all calculated DCF formulas grouped into categories using cards and a scrollable dialog.
frontend/src/components/profile/UserProf: Empty user profile form component file.
frontend/src/components/ResultsSection.t: Calculates and displays intrinsic and actual values with animations and a combined action button.
frontend/src/features/dcf/calculations.t: Computes hidden formula values and exposes intrinsic and actual price calculations using the formulas registry.
frontend/src/features/dcf/devChecks.ts: Runs verification checks comparing calculated intrinsic and actual values against expected benchmarks.
frontend/src/features/dcf/formulas.ts: Defines and computes all DCF formulas in a single registry with safe numeric handling.
frontend/src/features/dcf/presets.ts: Defines input structure and provides default, example, and verification preset DCF inputs.
frontend/src/features/dcf/validation.ts: Validates DCF input fields and provides helper for retrieving field-specific errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on authentication state, refreshing dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAllUserProfiles.ts: Empty hook file for fetching all user profiles.
Empty hook file for retrieving caller's user profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: React hook that animates numeric values from a start to end using a cubic ease-out and requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context with login, logout, status tracking, and persisted identity handling using Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a hook that maps DCF inputs to backend format and triggers a backend processDcf call via react-query.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueryInputs.ts: Manages DCF input state synced with URL query parameters and builds shareable links.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles with custom color variables for light/dark themes and typography adjustments.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Utility functions for formatting currency, large numbers, percentages, and general numeric output.
frontend/src/lib/number.ts: Utilities for parsing numeric and percentage inputs and converting decimals to percent strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query and Internet Identity provider before rendering the app.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading, storing, persisting, and clearing URL and sessionStorage parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration enabling dark mode, custom colors, fonts, animations, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s current state, including schema version, features, and pending requests. Indicates a fix request to remove the 'View Formulas' UI section.
